task: Compare the U.S. ETP Odd Lot Rate (%) between Quartile 1 and Quartile 4, viewing quartiles by price, and display the chart with a logarithmic scale on the vertical axis.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct SEC visualization page for U.S. ETP Odd Lot Rate (%) at https://www.sec.gov/marketstructure/datavis/ma_etp_oddlotrate.html. It identified the chart controls and used them to set the vertical scale to logarithmic, confirmed by page evaluation showing "logscale": true. It switched the quartile view to Price via #tab2_button and then selected only Price Quartile 1 and Price Quartile 4, confirmed by visibility state [false,false,false,false,true,false,false,true,...], meaning only series 4 and 7 (Price Q1 and Price Q4) were visible. The final snapshot also showed the Price quartile buttons and changed y-axis tick labels consistent with log scale. This satisfies the task to compare Quartile 1 and Quartile 4, viewing quartiles by price, with a logarithmic vertical axis.
final_result_response: Done. The SEC chart is showing U.S. ETP Odd Lot Rate (%) for Price Quartile 1 and Quartile 4 only, with the vertical axis set to logarithmic scale.
action_history: Opening SEC website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.sec.gov/');
Searching SEC site for the chart: await page.locator('e20').fill('U.S. ETP Odd Lot Rate Odd Lot Rate quartile price');
Searching SEC site for the chart: await page.locator('e21').click();
Setting chart to price quartiles 1 and 4 with log scale: await page.locator('#scale_toggle').click();
Setting chart to price quartiles 1 and 4 with log scale: await page.locator('#reset_button').click();
Setting chart to price quartiles 1 and 4 with log scale: await page.locator('#tab2_button').click();
Selecting Quartile 1 and Quartile 4: await page.locator('e41').click();
Selecting Quartile 1 and Quartile 4: await page.locator('e44').click();
